message:
Analyze this email and determine if it contains loan-related information.

Email Subject: ✅ The Checkpoint & Top-10 Tech Pulse: The Human-AI Frontier (Jan 11)
Email Content: KEYARITE: TIDES Tech News By Kalilur Rahman By Kalilur Rahman Read this article on LinkedIn to join the conversation Read on LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/checkpoint-top-10-tech-pulse-human-ai-frontier-jan-11-kalilur-rahman-eiayc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3Bi5Wq6LqmS2WlNz53cFqooQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFMjYnuODQXdg&midSig=1umDexnoLrFY41&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-10ivnq~mk9fty1x~j3-null-null&eid=10ivnq-mk9fty1x-j3 ✅ The Checkpoint & Top-10 Tech Pulse: The Human-AI Frontier (Jan 11) As CES 2026 dust settles, it's time for "The Checkpoint." Today's edition focuses on the human element: leadership strategies in an AI-driven world, critical career growth insights, and the success stories emerging from the new human-AI frontier. We're looking at how to navigate the shift from "what AI can do" to "what we can achieve with A

Determine if this is:
1. A quarterly loan summary (contains outstanding balance, principal paid, interest paid, EMI details)
2. An interest rate change notification (contains old rate, new rate, effective date)
3. Other loan-related email
4. Not a loan email

Return ONLY a JSON object with:
{
  "isLoanEmail": true or false,
  "emailType": "quarterly-summary" | "interest-rate-change" | "other",
  "confidence": number between 0 and 1
}
systemPrompt: You are a financial email analyzer. Analyze emails and determine if they contain loan information. Return ONLY valid JSON with "isLoanEmail" (boolean), "emailType" (string), and "confidence" (number 0-1) fields.
